app.name: Airweave
app.one_liner: Open-source context retrieval layer for AI agents and RAG systems.

screens.name: Airweave Dashboard
screens.purpose: Display connected data sources, sync status, and enable querying of unified retrieval layer.

rust_commands.name: start_airweave
rust_commands.purpose: Initialize and start the Airweave local instance using the provided startup script.

mvp_plan: week 1: Clone repository and run ./start.sh to launch local Airweave instance
week 1: Connect a sample data source (e.g., local document or database)
week 1: Perform initial retrieval query via REST API or SDK
week 1: Verify Docker containers (including Vespa and text2vec) are running
acceptance_tests: AI agent retrieves grounded, up-to-date context from multiple sources in a single query
New data connector (e.g., Intercom or PowerPoint) can be added and syncs data without errors
System starts successfully via ./start.sh with all services (Vespa, backend, frontend) operational
